May 05, 2023



The H4ck3r Th3m3 uses a flexible grid system for responsive layouts.

This is a half-width column on larger screens.
It becomes full-width on smaller screens.
Column 1
Column 2
Column 3
Col 1
Col 2
Col 3
Col 4

You can nest grids for more complex layouts:
